TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: TartanofRedlands.com has successfully undergone a comprehensive website redesign guided by a detailed SEMrush audit to strengthen SEO performance, technical stability, and overall user experience. Key improvements include an optimized XML sitemap, resolved crawl errors, updated plugins, enhanced caching for faster load times, improved mobile responsiveness, a streamlined site structure, and the implementation of JSON-LD Schema to increase visibility in Google Rich Results and AI-driven search. In addition, a strategic six-month blog plan has been developed—covering keyword research, local SEO, product and service content, industry trends, tutorials, and an annual review—to drive sustained traffic and engagement. While the email contact form is still in development, all other enhancements have been completed to ensure long-term growth and stronger search performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a comprehensive SEO audit of the Tartan website using SEMrush, assessing domain authority, organic visibility, keyword rankings, and competitor performance. Analyzed search trends to uncover growth opportunities and identified technical, on-page, and content optimization gaps impacting performance. Evaluated page speed and user experience factors to enhance engagement, improve search rankings, and drive overall digital performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on resolving issues for Tartan, troubleshooting technical challenges, and implementing solutions to ensure smooth functionality, improving system performance and user experience while addressing all reported concerns effectively.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a detailed SEO audit of the Tartan website using SEMrush and hothseo evaluating domain authority, organic visibility, keyword rankings, and competitor performance. Analyzed search trends to identify potential growth opportunities. Highlighted technical, on-page, and content optimization gaps that were impacting the site’s performance, providing actionable insights to enhance overall SEO strategy and improve search engine rankings. This audit aimed to boost website visibility and competitive advantage.sitemap for the Tartan website to ensure efficient indexing by search engines. The sitemap outlined the website’s structure, including key pages, categories, and subpages. This was done to enhance crawlability, ensure proper page prioritization, and improve the site’s overall search engine optimization by making it easier for search engines to discover and index important content.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: TartanofRedlands.com has successfully completed a comprehensive website redesign to improve SEO performance, technical stability, and user experience, guided by insights from a detailed SEMrush audit. Key enhancements include an optimized XML sitemap, resolved crawl errors, updated plugins, improved caching for faster load times, better mobile responsiveness, a streamlined site structure, and the implementation of JSON-LD Schema to boost visibility in Google Rich Results and AI-driven search. A six-month blog plan has also been developed, focusing on keyword research, local SEO, product and service content, industry trends, tutorials, and an annual review to drive sustained traffic and engagement. While the email contact form is still under development, all other improvements are fully implemented to support long-term growth and stronger search performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked Tartan's meta tags and updated them for improved SEO performance, ensuring accurate keywords, descriptions, and other relevant metadata to enhance search engine visibility and optimization.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: I conducted a comprehensive SEO audit of the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO, evaluating domain authority, organic visibility, keyword rankings, and competitor performance. I analyzed search trends to uncover growth opportunities and identified technical, on-page, and content optimization gaps impacting the site's performance. Additionally, I created a sitemap outlining the website’s structure, including key pages and categories, to improve crawlability, ensure proper page prioritization, and enhance SEO strategy for better search engine rankings and visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: TartanofRedlands.com has completed a full website redesign aimed at boosting SEO, technical performance, and user experience, informed by a detailed SEMrush audit. The updates include an enhanced XML sitemap, fixed crawl errors, updated plugins, and improved caching for quicker page load times. Mobile responsiveness has been strengthened, the site structure streamlined, and JSON-LD Schema has been added to improve visibility in Google Rich Results and AI-based search. A six-month blog strategy has also been set up, focusing on keyword optimization, local SEO, product and service content, industry trends, tutorials, and an annual review to maintain consistent traffic and engagement. Although the email contact form is still being worked on, all other improvements have been fully implemented to foster long-term growth and improved search rankings.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a thorough check for error links on the Tartan website to ensure smooth navigation. Identified any broken URLs or redirects that might affect the user experience. Took steps to resolve these issues by updating the links or replacing them with the correct ones, improving site reliability and overall performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Manually checked Tartan's duplicacy and orphan page issues, identifying problematic pages, and worked on resolving them by removing duplicates and properly linking orphan pages to enhance site structure and SEO.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a detailed SEO audit of the Tartan website using HothSEO to assess domain authority, organic traffic, keyword rankings. Evaluated search trends to identify growth opportunities and analyzed technical SEO, on-page elements, and content structure. Highlighted performance gaps affecting visibility and rankings, and documented actionable recommendations to improve search performance, optimize content strategy, strengthen technical health, and enhance over

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes:
TartanofRedlands.com has undergone a comprehensive website redesign to improve search engine visibility, technical performance, and overall user experience. The updates were guided by insights from a detailed SEMrush audit. Key improvements include the creation of an optimized XML sitemap, resolution of crawl errors, plugin updates, and enhanced caching to significantly improve page loading speed.

The site has also been refined for better mobile responsiveness and a more streamlined structure, making navigation easier for visitors and search engines alike. In addition, JSON-LD Schema markup has been implemented to enhance the website’s eligibility for Google Rich Results and AI-driven search features.

To support long-term growth, a six-month blog content strategy has been developed. This plan focuses on targeted keyword optimization, local SEO, product and service highlights, industry insights, tutorials, and an annual performance review to sustain steady traffic and engagement.

While the email contact form is still in progress, all other updates have been successfully completed, positioning the website for stronger search rankings and continued digital growth.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Error logs were searched to identify issues, focusing specifically on 404 error pages. Investigations were made into the causes of these errors, and solutions were implemented to resolve the issues. Necessary updates were made to ensure proper redirects and improve user experience by addressing the 404 page errors.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Resolved crawling and broken link issues on Tartan, ensuring improved site accessibility, better search engine indexing, and a seamless user experience by fixing errors and optimizing URLs.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit of the Tartan website using HothSEO to evaluate domain authority, organic traffic, and keyword rankings. Analyzed search trends to identify growth opportunities and improve visibility. Reviewed technical SEO, on-page optimization, and content structure to detect issues affecting performance and provided actionable recommendations to enhance search engine rankings and overall website effectiveness.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: TartanofRedlands.com has undergone a comprehensive redesign aimed at enhancing search engine visibility, technical performance, and user experience, guided by insights from a detailed SEMrush audit. Key improvements include an optimized XML sitemap, crawl error resolution, plugin updates, and better caching for faster page loading. The site now features improved mobile responsiveness, a streamlined structure for easier navigation, and the addition of JSON-LD Schema markup to boost eligibility for Google Rich Results and AI-driven search features. A six-month blog content strategy focusing on targeted keyword optimization, local SEO, product/service highlights, industry insights, tutorials, and annual performance reviews has been implemented to ensure long-term growth. While the email contact form is still in progress, the updates have positioned the website for stronger search rankings and sustained digital growth.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: meeting with Jeffrey focused on reviewing SEO performance and discussing potential email marketing. We presented the SEO improvements for both Tartan and Falconer, including increased traffic, keyword rankings, and overall visibility. Jeffrey asked how he could reach the #1 ranking for certain keywords, and we explained that additional strategies like blog content and backlinks would help, but Falconer currently does not have blog content in its plan. He also showed interest in email marketing but does not want to commit immediately; instead, he requested a test email campaign (for example, promoting Saturday prime rib) to see how it looks and performs before signing up. He asked us to confirm with Ravi the $200/month email marketing details, how many campaigns can be sent per month, and whether it requires a yearly contract. He also asked if emails from Tartan and Falconer can be combined legally, suggesting adding a website opt-in stating customers may receive emails from both restaurants. The next step is to run the test email campaign and review the results with him next week before he decides whether to proceed.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: TartanofRedlands.com has recently undergone a comprehensive redesign to improve search engine visibility, technical performance, and overall user experience, based on insights from a SEMrush audit. Key updates include optimization of the XML sitemap, resolution of crawl errors, plugin updates, and improved caching to enhance page loading speed. The website now features better mobile responsiveness, a simplified site structure for easier navigation, and the implementation of JSON-LD Schema markup to support Google Rich Results and AI-driven search features. In addition, a six-month blog content strategy focused on targeted keywords, local SEO, product and service highlights, industry insights, tutorials, and annual performance reviews has been introduced to support long-term growth. The email contact form is currently in progress, but overall the updates have positioned the website for stronger search rankings and sustained digital performance. ??

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Completed a website audit and addressed on-page SEO issues for Tartan, identifying technical errors, optimizing page elements, and improving overall site structure to enhance search engine performance and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Searched for a suitable blog title related to Tartan and identified relevant topics to align with the intended audience and content strategy. Created the blog content based on the selected title, ensured the information was clear and engaging, checked the content for duplicate or similar material to maintain originality, and then published the finalized blog.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Created and published a blog about tartan by first researching and selecting an appropriate title. Verified the content for duplicate issues to ensure originality. Designed a visually appealing featured image to enhance engagement and finalized the post by publishing it on the website for readers to access.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Searched for Falcon-related errors and worked on identifying and resolving the issues affecting the system. Conducted troubleshooting steps to ensure the errors were addressed properly. Additionally, used SEMrush to scan the website for broken links, reviewed the results, and identified links that require correction to improve website performance and SEO.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes:
TartanofRedlands.com has recently been redesigned to enhance its search visibility, website performance, and overall user experience. Several technical improvements were implemented, including optimization of the XML sitemap, fixing crawl issues, updating plugins, and improving caching to increase page loading speed.

The website now offers improved mobile responsiveness and a more streamlined structure, making navigation easier for visitors. JSON-LD Schema markup has also been added to support Google Rich Results and modern AI-driven search features.

To support long-term growth, a six-month blog content plan has been introduced. This strategy focuses on targeted keywords, local SEO, product and service highlights, industry insights, tutorials, and yearly performance reviews to consistently strengthen the website’s online presence.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked Tartan's image alt text issues and internal links, identifying missing or incorrect alt attributes and broken links, and made necessary updates to enhance accessibility and improve site navigation.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Researched potential blog titles for a tartan website, selected a suitable topic, and created a detailed blog post. Additionally, generated a custom featured image to accompany the blog, ensuring it aligned with the theme. Finally, published the blog on the website, making it live for readers.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a detailed SEO audit of the Tartan website using HothSEO, assessing domain authority, organic traffic, and keyword performance. Analyzed search trends to pinpoint growth opportunities and boost visibility. Evaluated technical SEO, on-page elements, and content structure to identify performance issues. Developed actionable recommendations to improve search engine rankings, enhance website effectiveness, and optimize overall user experience, ensuring the site aligns with best practices for organic search growth and long-term digital presence.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes:
TartanofRedlands.com has undergone a major redesign aimed at boosting search visibility, optimizing website performance, and enhancing the overall user experience. Key technical improvements include refining the XML sitemap, addressing crawl issues, updating plugins, and improving caching to accelerate page load times.

The website now features better mobile responsiveness and a more intuitive structure, making it easier for users to navigate. Additionally, JSON-LD Schema markup has been incorporated to help support Google Rich Results and modern AI-powered search features.

To ensure sustained growth, a strategic six-month blog content plan has been put in place. This plan emphasizes targeting relevant keywords, improving local SEO, showcasing products and services, sharing industry insights, offering tutorials, and conducting yearly performance reviews—ultimately reinforcing the site’s online presence over time.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and fixed pages on Tartan of Redlands with duplicate H1 and title tags. Ensured proper SEO structure by resolving the issue for better page ranking and improved search engine visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: A blog title was researched for the Tartan website, followed by the creation of a comprehensive blog post. Meta tags, descriptions, and other SEO elements were carefully selected and implemented to enhance search visibility. A custom featured image was designed to complement the blog, which was then published successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on fixing Tartan’s broken links and images, ensuring proper functionality and improving user experience by updating or replacing missing elements to enhance site performance and accessibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: I performed in-depth SEO audit of the Tartan website using tools like SEMrush and HothSEO. The analysis included evaluating domain authority, organic search visibility, keyword rankings. I also assessed competitor performance to identify gaps and opportunities. The audit highlighted technical SEO issues, content optimization needs, and strategic recommendations to improve search engine rankings and overall online presence.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes:
TartanofRedlands.com has undergone a comprehensive redesign aimed at improving search engine visibility, boosting website performance, and enhancing the user experience. Key updates include refining the XML sitemap, fixing crawl issues, updating plugins, and optimizing caching to speed up page load times.

The website now offers improved mobile responsiveness and a more user-friendly layout, ensuring seamless navigation. Additionally, JSON-LD Schema markup has been integrated to support Google Rich Results and advanced AI-driven search features.

To support long-term growth, a strategic six-month blog content plan has been implemented. This plan focuses on targeting high-value keywords, enhancing local SEO, promoting products and services, sharing expert insights, providing tutorials, and conducting annual performance reviews—ensuring the site’s continued success and visibility in the future.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Resolved 8 issues related to broken internal JavaScript and CSS files, ensuring improved functionality, faster load times, and a smoother user experience across the website by fixing code errors.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: A blog was developed for the Tartan website, starting with a thorough search to identify an engaging and relevant blog title. After finalizing the title, a well-researched and captivating blog post was created, tailored to the target audience. A custom featured image was designed to reflect the blog's theme and the website's branding. The blog was then published on the website, ensuring proper integration of formatting, SEO elements, and multimedia to maximize engagement and visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: I conducted a comprehensive SEO audit for the Tartan website using tools like SEMrush and HothSEO. The audit involved evaluating domain authority, organic search visibility, and keyword rankings. I analyzed competitor performance, identified gaps, and provided strategic recommendations for content optimization and technical SEO improvements. Additionally, I reviewed the sitemap and assessed site health using Google Search Console.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: I’ve completed a comprehensive review and improvement of TartanofRedlands.com, including a full website redesign focused on enhancing search engine visibility, website performance, and user experience. Key updates include refining the XML sitemap, fixing crawl issues, updating plugins, optimizing caching for faster load times, and improving mobile responsiveness with a more user-friendly layout. I also integrated JSON-LD Schema markup for Google Rich Results and AI-driven search features. Additionally, a strategic six-month blog content plan has been implemented to target high-value keywords, boost local SEO, promote products and services, and ensure long-term success with annual performance reviews. Also, email marketing settings were checked, and email testing was conducted to ensure proper functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on improving Tartan’s website by optimizing image alt text and strengthening internal linking structure to enhance accessibility, SEO performance, and overall site navigation.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit for the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO. TimeEntry.Notes: I’ve completed a comprehensive review and overhaul of TartanofRedlands.com, which included a full website redesign aimed at improving search engine visibility, site performance, and overall user experience. I also implemented JSON-LD Schema markup to improve visibility in Google Rich Results and integrated AI-driven search features. TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Searched for a suitable and engaging title for a tartan-themed blog post, ensuring it captured the essence of the content. After finalizing, created an eye-catching featured image to visually complement the post. Finally, published the blog on the website, making it live and accessible to readers.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Searched for broken links on the Falcon website by running a thorough link-checking process. TimeEntry.Notes: Searched for an engaging blog title for the tartan theme, selecting one that would captivate readers. Focused on delivering unique insights and maintaining consistency across all posts to enhance reader engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: A blog was created, with relevant links inserted and a featured image designed to enhance its visual appeal. The content was carefully crafted to align with the intended message and audience. Once finalized, the blog was published, making it accessible to readers and ensuring it complements the overall website strategy.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Added CAPTCHA to enhance security and addressed on-page issues for Tartan of Redlands, including optimizing alt text and meta tags to improve accessibility, SEO performance, and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted an in-depth SEO audit for the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO, focusing on domain authority, organic search visibility, and keyword rankings. TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: I recently completed a comprehensive overhaul of TartanofRedlands.com, including a full website redesign aimed at improving SEO, site performance, and user experience. Key updates involved refining the XML sitemap, addressing crawl issues, updating plugins, optimizing caching for faster load times, and enhancing mobile responsiveness with a more intuitive layout. I also implemented JSON-LD Schema markup to boost visibility in Google Rich Results and integrated AI-driven search features. TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on Tartan's on-page issues, identifying and addressing technical SEO challenges, optimizing content, improving page load speeds, and ensuring better site structure to enhance search engine visibility and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a detailed SEO audit for the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO, focusing on domain authority, organic search visibility, and keyword rankings. Additionally, I assessed site speed performance to identify potential areas for optimization. By analyzing competitor strategies, I uncovered gaps and opportunities for improvement. The audit aimed to enhance search engine rankings, improve user experience, and boost organic traffic through actionable insights and performance improvements.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: I recently completed a comprehensive overhaul of TartanofRedlands.com, including a full website redesign aimed at improving SEO, site performance, and user experience. Key updates involved refining the XML sitemap, addressing crawl issues, updating plugins, optimizing caching for faster load times, and enhancing mobile responsiveness with a more intuitive layout. I also implemented JSON-LD Schema markup to boost visibility in Google Rich Results and integrated AI-driven search features. Additionally, I developed a six-month blog content plan targeting high-value keywords for local SEO and long-term growth, with annual performance reviews scheduled. Finally, I added reCAPTCHA and integrated Cloudflare to improve security and protect the site from spam and bots.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: A blog for Tartan has been created, focusing on its rich history, unique designs, and cultural significance. The blog highlights various aspects of Tartan, from its origins in Scottish heritage to its contemporary uses in fashion and interior design. With visually appealing graphics and well-researched content, the blog engages readers and shares Tartan’s timeless appeal. It has been published and is now live, offering valuable insights and updates on all things Tartan, with a commitment to continuous content creation and engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: A tartan blog was created, which involved searching for an appropriate title, generating content related to tartan, and publishing the blog. The process focused on delivering informative and engaging content to readers, covering various aspects of tartan such as its history, patterns, and cultural significance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: issue with Falcon was identified and resolved, addressing the root cause of the error. This involved troubleshooting the system, applying the necessary fixes, and verifying that the error no longer occurred. After the resolution, Falcon was restored to its intended operational state, ensuring smooth performance going forward.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit for the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO tools. The audit focused on evaluating domain authority, organic search visibility, and keyword rankings. I also assessed the website's site speed performance, identifying areas for improvement. This in-depth analysis aimed to optimize the website's overall SEO performance, improve search engine rankings, and enhance user experience for better online visibility and traffic.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes:
I recently completed a comprehensive overhaul of TartanofRedlands.com, focusing on enhancing SEO, site performance, and user experience. The redesign included significant updates to the XML sitemap, addressing crawl issues, and updating key plugins to ensure smooth functionality. I optimized the site’s caching system for faster load times and improved mobile responsiveness with a more intuitive, user-friendly layout.

To boost visibility in Google Rich Results, I implemented JSON-LD Schema markup and integrated AI-powered search features to enhance user interaction. Additionally, I developed a six-month blog content strategy designed to target high-value keywords for local SEO and sustainable long-term growth. Annual performance reviews are scheduled to ensure continued improvement and alignment with business goals.

For added security, I incorporated reCAPTCHA and integrated Cloudflare to safeguard the site from spam, bots, and malicious attacks.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked internal links for Tartan, verifying proper functionality, ensuring no broken links, and optimizing navigation for improved user experience, search engine optimization, and seamless access to relevant content across the website.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Planned and organized a comprehensive 30-day blog content calendar for Tartan, aligning topics with audience interests and SEO strategy. Conducted research to finalize an engaging blog title, created and edited the blog content, ensured originality through duplicate content checks, designed a high-quality featured image, and successfully published the blog while maintaining consistency, quality, and visibility across platforms.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: The website tartonofredlands has over 600 issues related to unminified JavaScript and CSS files, along with pages loading excessive JS and CSS files, impacting performance, load speed, and overall user experience.

TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted an in-depth SEO audit for the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO. TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: For TartanofRedlands.com, the primary goal was to optimize SEO, enhance site performance, and improve the overall user experience. Key updates included optimizing the caching system for faster load times and enhancing mobile responsiveness for a smoother, more intuitive design. To increase user engagement, I introduced AI-powered search functionality, allowing users to quickly discover relevant content. To improve visibility in Google Rich Results, I added JSON-LD Schema markup. TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Researched and analyzed a tartan-focused website to identify an appropriate and engaging blog title. TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted an SEO audit for the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO tools. Evaluated key performance metrics including domain authority, organic search visibility, keyword rankings, and technical SEO issues. Identified optimization opportunities, content gaps, and on-page improvements to enhance search performance. Compiled a detailed analysis report with actionable recommendations to improve rankings, increase traffic, and strengthen overall digital presence. Ensured alignment with current SEO best practices and trends.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes:
For TartanofRedlands.com, the focus was on elevating search visibility, boosting performance, and delivering a more seamless user experience. I implemented advanced caching solutions to significantly reduce load times and redesigned the site for improved mobile responsiveness, ensuring a smooth and intuitive interface across devices.

To drive deeper user engagement, I integrated AI-powered search functionality, enabling visitors to quickly find relevant content. I also enhanced the site’s presence in Google Rich Results by implementing structured data using JSON-LD schema markup.

In addition, I created a six-month content roadmap centered around high-impact, location-based SEO keywords to support steady organic traffic growth. Ongoing annual performance audits are in place to ensure the website continues to evolve in line with business objectives and industry trends.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed data and prepared a weekly report for Tartan, analyzing key metrics and performance insights to support informed decision-making and ongoing strategy improvements.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Created and published a detailed blog for the Tartan website by researching and finalizing an engaging blog title, generating high-quality and relevant content, and verifying originality through duplicate content checks. Designed and added a featured image, implemented on-page SEO optimization (keywords, meta details, formatting), reviewed overall structure, and successfully published the blog.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: Conducted a comprehensive SEO audit for the Tartan website using SEMrush and HothSEO tools. Assessed domain authority, organic visibility, keyword rankings, and backlink profile. Identified technical issues such as crawl errors, slow load speeds, and metadata gaps. Recommended on-page and off-page optimizations, content improvements, and keyword strategies to enhance search performance, increase traffic, and strengthen overall site authority and competitiveness for sustainable long-term growth and improved user experience across devices.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - Level 3
TimeEntry.Notes: For TartanofRedlands.com, the approach centered on strengthening search visibility, optimizing performance, and enhancing the overall user experience. This included implementing advanced caching techniques to significantly improve load times and redesigning the site for seamless mobile responsiveness. An AI-driven search feature was introduced to boost user engagement, while structured data (JSON-LD) was deployed to increase eligibility for Google Rich Results. In parallel, a six-month content strategy focused on high-impact, location-based SEO keywords was executed, complemented by continuous performance audits and KPI tracking to drive sustained growth and ensure alignment with business objectives.
